info.english_meaning: to plow to furrow to cultivate
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: karzatyAkarzaRe Se tu kfzate kfzatItyuBe ' (Slo. 178) iti devaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: tiskfta karanA bAhara nikAlanA Upara uWAnA
AkarzaRa karanA KIMcanA uWAnA uttejana karanA
uWAnA uDdfta karanA uWA lenA uttejana karanA Upara uWAnA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'satkulInaSca SUraSca yaSca senAM prakarzati' (BA॰Adi॰136.35) prakarzati nayati praRayatIti vA senAnIrBavatItyarTaH
'tasmAttvaM puruzavyAGra prakarzEtAM mahAcamUm' (BA॰karRa॰10.35) ukto'rTaH
'sTAnAdapInduH kupitaH prakarzet' (rA॰3.43.42) AkfzyADaH pAtayedityarTaH
'ekaM tu mama dInasya mano BUyaH prakarzati yadasyAhaM priyAKyAne na karomi sadfka priyam' (rA॰5.70.11) manaH prakarzati manaH kadarTayati cetastudatItyarTaH
'paScAt darBAnAstIrya dakziRataH prAcI prakarzeduttarataSca (KA॰gf॰1.2.9) vastArayedityAha

sa tEH prakfzyatAkfzyata ca (rA॰5.61.19) agrato'kfzyatetyAha

gARqIvaM ca prakarzataH prakarzaRaM DanurAropaRaM Bavati
